prompt.seamless_common_suffix: seamless tiling pattern, uniform distribution, no focal point, consistent density across the image, no borders, no vignette
prompt.large_common_suffix: wide scenic composition, consistent lighting, high detail across frame

negative_prompt_common_seamless: single subject, focal point, vignette, centered composition, edge darkening, text, watermark, logo
negative_prompt_common_large: text, watermark, logo, low resolution artifacts

variants.note: Variants are produced by sharp .modulate({ hue }) — no extra AI calls.
